name: drawer
title: BTDrawer
description: Right-side sliding panel (D-Drawer). Teleports to <body> via Vue Teleport. 400 px wide, full viewport height, rounded left corners, shadow cast leftward. Footer has two equal-width buttons (secondary left, primary right).

files.content:
export { default as BTDrawer } from './BTDrawer.vue';
export type { BTDrawerProps, BTDrawerSide, BTDrawerButtonDirection } from './BTDrawer.types';
